name: Empo
subtitle: Run RPG Maker games on iPhone and iPad.
description: Empo wraps the mkxp-z RPG Maker engine in a native SwiftUI library and a customizable touch-controls overlay. RPG Maker XP / VX / VX Ace games and modern Pokemon Essentials forks run on-device, no desktop emulator needed.

apps.name: Empo
apps.subtitle: Run RPG Maker games on iPhone and iPad.
apps.localizedDescription:
Empo wraps the mkxp-z RPG Maker engine in a native SwiftUI library and a customizable touch-controls overlay. RPG Maker XP / VX / VX Ace games and modern Pokemon Essentials forks run on-device, no desktop emulator needed.

Features:
- Plays games made for RGSS1 (XP), RGSS2 (VX), RGSS3 (VX Ace), and modern mkxp-z forks
- Multi-Ruby native dispatch (1.8, 1.9, 3.1) with auto-detection
- Imports games from folders, .zip, .7z, .rar, and JoiPlay's .jgp format
- Customizable on-screen D-pad and action buttons, with per-game layouts
- Pause and resume from the library with a hero zoom transition
- Library with sort, search, grid/list views, and bulk delete
